title: Chase the Clouds
description: Do you like the new Clouds? Well this is the Pack for You.
body:
# Chase the Clouds
This resource pack changes the old clouds from 1.21.5 and before to the new clouds from 1.21.6+.
## Preview
![Clouds from Above](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31965baf5539afb669b3eb3878ec3f1e2fa5d866.jpeg)![Plains Clouds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c99cc9037f1a8f18d1cfdc18359aac3aeee2260.jpeg)
